inputs.label: Purchase Price
inputs.businessContext: Price paid to acquire the goods (VAT-inclusive).

businessContext_i18n.en: Price paid to acquire the goods (VAT-inclusive).
businessContext_i18n.de: Preis für den Erwerb der Waren (inkl. MwSt.).
Preis, der dem Kunden berechnet wird (inkl. MwSt.).

inputs.label: VAT Rate
inputs.businessContext: Standard VAT rate percentage applicable to the goods.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard VAT rate percentage applicable to the goods.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mala uygulanan standart KDV oranı yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Mehrwertsteuersatz in Prozent, der auf die Waren anwendbar ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de TVA standard applicable aux biens.

inputs.label: Allowable Costs
inputs.businessContext: Costs directly attributable to the sale that reduce the margin (e.g., refurbishment, transport).

businessContext_i18n.en: Costs directly attributable to the sale that reduce the margin (e.g., refurbishment, transport).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Satışa doğrudan atfedilebilen ve marjı azaltan maliyetler (ör. yenileme, nakliye).
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten, die direkt dem Verkauf zuzurechnen sind und die Marge verringern (z. B. Aufbereitung, Transport).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts directement attribuables à la vente qui réduisent la marge (ex. : rénovation, transport).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
